question_text: Which of the following correctly orders these electromagnetic waves from longest to shortest wavelength?

options.label: A
options.text: Gamma rays, X-rays, ultraviolet, visible light

options.label: B
options.text: Radio waves, microwaves, infrared, visible light

options.label: C
options.text: Visible light, infrared, microwaves, radio waves

options.label: D
options.text: Microwaves, radio waves, visible light, X-rays

explanation: The electromagnetic spectrum is ordered by wavelength: radio waves have the longest wavelength, followed by microwaves, infrared, visible light, ultraviolet, X-rays, then gamma rays with the shortest. Option B shows this correct order.
